etymology.interpretation: The character 心(xīn, "heart") originally depicted the shape of an actual heart, representing thoughts, emotions, and the core of a person. Over time, it has become highly stylized, but it continues to convey the notion of the heart as the center of emotions and consciousness.

examples.chinese: 她的心(她的心)一直都在帮助别人(一直都在幫助別人)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de xīn yīzhí dōu zài bāngzhù biérén.
examples.english: Her heart is always in helping others.

examples.chinese: 在城市的中心(在城市的中心)，有一个美丽的公园(有一個美麗的公園)。
examples.pinyin: Zài chéngshì de zhōngxīn, yǒu yí gè měilì de gōngyuán.
examples.english: At the center of the city, there is a beautiful park.

examples.chinese: 对于许多人来说(對於許多人來說)，家庭是生活的核心(家庭是生活的核心)。
examples.pinyin: Duìyú xǔduō rén lái shuō, jiātíng shì shēnghuó de héxīn.
examples.english: For many people, family is the core of life.
